arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI to play Celtic: Rookie centre-half drafted in and McGinn call made
arts.sum: Unai Emery has named his Aston Villa team to face Celtic in the Champions League this evening.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa left fuming by Arsenal's £60m Ollie Watkins bid as club make stance clear
arts.sum: Arsenal have launched a surprise £60million bid to sign striker Ollie Watkins from Aston Villa this month and the Midlands side have been left fuming by the timing of the approach

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Celtic confirmed as Unai Emery makes one change
arts.sum: Villa XI: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Bogarde, Digne, Kamara, Tielemans, Bailey, Rogers, Ramsey, Watkins. From back to front, Emi Martinez starts in goal behind a defence of Matty Cash, Ezri Konsa, Bogarde and Lucas Digne.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fail with shock Ollie Watkins transfer bid: Will they make a new offer for Aston Villa's striker?
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly fail with a surprise bid to sign England international Ollie Watkins from fellow Premier League side Ollie Watkins.

arts.ttl: Daizen Maeda discovers Celtic Champions League playoff fate after Young Boys red card
arts.sum: Celtic fans reacted to Maeda’s red card apology Maeda discovers suspension fate for Celtic’s Champions League playoff

arts.ttl: When Jota can be registered for Celtic in Champions League revealed
arts.sum: When can Jota be registered for Celtic in the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Celtic: Do Tyrone Mings, Jhon Duran start Champions League tie?
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Celtic announce their starting lineups for Wednesday's Champions League tie.

arts.ttl: Celtic team news vs Aston Villa for Champions League tie as fans question strength of bench
arts.sum: Celtic starting XI vs Aston Villa confirmed Celtic starting XI: SCHMEICHEL, JOHNSTON, TRUSTY, SCALES, TAYLOR, MCGREGOR, ENGELS, HATATE, YANG, KUHN, IDAH.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'on the verge' of transfer agreement amid mega bids for Jhon Duran and Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: Al-Nassr are reportedly on the verge of reaching a verbal agreement with Aston Villa over signing Jhon Duran. Then, after assisting Jacob Ramsey in the draw with West Ham last weekend, Watkins reached 100 goal involvements in the fewest Premier League games (169) by any player since Kevin De Bruyne achieved the milestone in 155 matches in July 2020.

arts.ttl: Champions League final group games: join us for updates on all 18 matches – live
arts.sum: Updates from a tantalising final round of games Manchester City v Club Brugge – live updates Live scoreboard | Who needs what | Email Scott Welcome to chaos. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round. Here are those fixtures … Aston Villa v Celtic Barcelona v Atalanta Bayer Leverkusen v Sparta Prague Bayern Munich v Slovan Bratislava Borussia Dortmund v Shakhtar Donetsk Brest v Real Madrid Dinamo Zagreb v AC Milan Girona v Arsenal Internazionale v Monaco Juventus v Benfica Lille v Feyenoord Manchester City v Club Brugge PSV v Liverpool Red Bull Salzburg v Atletico Madrid Sporting v Bologna Sturm Graz v RB Leipzig Stuttgart v Paris Saint-Germain Young Boys v Red Star Belgrade Continue reading...
